revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:稲木神社]] {{Expand Japanese|稲木神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Inagi Shrine | native_name = 稲木神社 | image = Inagi shrine, Konan.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Inagi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.3233528|136.8802611}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu|ar|أماتيراسو|ary|أماطيراسو|az|Amaterasu|bcl|Amaterasu|be_x_old|Аматэрасу|be|Аматэрасу|bew|Amatérasu|bg|Аматерасу|ca|Amaterasu|cs|Amaterasu|da|Amaterasu|de|Amaterasu|el|Αματεράσου|en|Amaterasu|eo|Amaterasu|es|Amaterasu|et|Amaterasu|eu|Amaterasu|fa|آماتراسو|fi|Amaterasu|fr|Amaterasu|gl|Amaterasu|he|אמטראסו|hi|अमातेरसु|hr|Amaterasu|hu|Amateraszu Ómikami|hy|Ամատերասու Օմիկամի|id|Amaterasu|it|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|jaquote|アマテラス|jv|Amaterasu|ka|ამატერასუ|ko|아마테라스 오미카미|la|Amaterasu|lb|Amaterasu|lt|Amaterasu|lv|Amaterasu|min|Amaterasu|ml|അമതേരസു|mni|ꯑꯃꯇꯦꯔꯁꯨ ꯑꯣꯃꯤꯀꯃꯤ|ms|Amaterasu|nl|Amaterasu|nn|Amaterasu|no|Amaterasu|or|ଆମାତେରାଶୁ|pa|ਆਮਾਤੇਰਸ|pl|Amaterasu|pt|Amaterasu|ro|Amaterasu|ru|Аматэрасу|sco|Amaterasu|sh|Amaterasu|simple|Amaterasu Ōmikami|sk|Amaterasu Ómikami|sl|Amaterasu|sr|Аматерасу|su|Amaterasu|sv|Amaterasu|ta|அமதெரசு|th|อามาเตราซุ|tl|Amaterasu|tr|Amaterasu|uk|Аматерасу|uz|Amaterasu|vi|Amaterasu|wuu|天照大神|zh_min_nan|Amaterasu|zh_yue|天照大神|zh|天照大神|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}} }} {{nihongo|'''Inagi Shrine'''|稲木神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|ja|尾張国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11465292|1=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province}} ** Series ordinal: 51 ** P155: {{ill|Q60581|ltq=Q60581|qid=Q60581|1=Tagata Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039498|ltq=Q135039498|qid=Q135039498|1=Ishitsukurino Shrine (Q135039498)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Kōnan, Aichi|lt=Kōnan-shi|ar|كونان (آيتشي)|arz|كونان, ايتشى|azb|کونان، آیچی|ceb|Kōnan (lungsod sa Hapon)|ce|Конан (Айти)|ckb|کۆنان، ئایچی|de|Kōnan (Aichi)|en|Kōnan, Aichi|es|Kōnan (Aichi)|fa|کونان، آیچی|fi|Kōnan (Aichi)|fr|Kōnan (Aichi)|gl|Kōnan, Aichi|he|קונאן (עיר)|hy|Կոնան (Այչի)|id|Kōnan, Aichi|it|Kōnan (Aichi)|ja|江南市|kk|Конан|ko|고난시 (아이치현)|mg|Kōnan|mzn|کونان، آیچی|nl|Konan (Aichi)|pl|Kōnan (Aichi)|pnb|کونان|pt|Kōnan (Aichi)|ro|Kōnan, Aichi|ru|Конан (Айти)|sv|Kōnan, Aichi|th|โคนัง (จังหวัดไอจิ)|tl|Kōnan, Aichi|tr|Kōnan, Aichi|tt|Конан (Айти)|uk|Конан (Айті)|ur|کؤنان، ایچی|vi|Kōnan, Aichi|war|Kōnan, Aichi|wuu|江南市|zh_classical|江南市|zh_min_nan|Kônan-chhī|zh_yue|江南市|zh|江南市|qid=Q820496|1=Kōnan, Aichi}} * {{ill|Q514506|ltq=Q514506|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} * {{ill|Q1347719|ltq=Q1347719|qid=Q1347719|1=Niwa District}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.3233528|136.8802611}} == image (P18) == * Inagi shrine, Konan.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu|ar|أماتيراسو|ary|أماطيراسو|az|Amaterasu|bcl|Amaterasu|be_x_old|Аматэрасу|be|Аматэрасу|bew|Amatérasu|bg|Аматерасу|ca|Amaterasu|cs|Amaterasu|da|Amaterasu|de|Amaterasu|el|Αματεράσου|en|Amaterasu|eo|Amaterasu|es|Amaterasu|et|Amaterasu|eu|Amaterasu|fa|آماتراسو|fi|Amaterasu|fr|Amaterasu|gl|Amaterasu|he|אמטראסו|hi|अमातेरसु|hr|Amaterasu|hu|Amateraszu Ómikami|hy|Ամատերասու Օմիկամի|id|Amaterasu|it|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|jaquote|アマテラス|jv|Amaterasu|ka|ამატერასუ|ko|아마테라스 오미카미|la|Amaterasu|lb|Amaterasu|lt|Amaterasu|lv|Amaterasu|min|Amaterasu|ml|അമതേരസു|mni|ꯑꯃꯇꯦꯔꯁꯨ ꯑꯣꯃꯤꯀꯃꯤ|ms|Amaterasu|nl|Amaterasu|nn|Amaterasu|no|Amaterasu|or|ଆମାତେରାଶୁ|pa|ਆਮਾਤੇਰਸ|pl|Amaterasu|pt|Amaterasu|ro|Amaterasu|ru|Аматэрасу|sco|Amaterasu|sh|Amaterasu|simple|Amaterasu Ōmikami|sk|Amaterasu Ómikami|sl|Amaterasu|sr|Аматерасу|su|Amaterasu|sv|Amaterasu|ta|அமதெரசு|th|อามาเตราซุ|tl|Amaterasu|tr|Amaterasu|uk|Аматерасу|uz|Amaterasu|vi|Amaterasu|wuu|天照大神|zh_min_nan|Amaterasu|zh_yue|天照大神|zh|天照大神|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181391 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いなぎじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8180005011001 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135039497|ltq=Q135039497|qid=Q135039497|1=Inakino Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '愛知県江南市寄木町稲木96', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:稲木神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11596632}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=2015-01-11 (Sun) 13:17 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Inagi Shrine | 画像=[[File:Inagi shrine, Konan.jpg|250px]]
Torii | 所在地={{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kōnan|Q820496|qid=Q820496|1=Kōnan, Aichi}}Yoriki-chō Inagi 96 | 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|19|24.07|N|136|52|48.94|E|display=ti}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} Ōnakatsu-hiko-no-Mikoto | 社格=former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} | 創建=Unknown | 本殿= | 例祭= | 神事= | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Aichi|label=Inagi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Inagi Shrine''' (いなぎじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kōnan|Q820496|qid=Q820496|1=Kōnan, Aichi}}, {{ill|lt=Aichi Prefecture|Q80434|qid=Q80434|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. It is the Inagi Shrine of {{ill|lt=Niwa District|Q1347719|qid=Q1347719|1=Niwa District}} in {{ill|lt=Owari Province|Q514506|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha register|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was called Tendō-gū, and is also known as "Otendō-san." === Summary === * The founding period is unknown. One theory says the ancient clan Inagi Wake founded it by enshrining their ancestor '''Ōnakatsu-hiko-no-Mikoto'''. * Its location had become unknown since around the {{ill|lt=Sengoku period|Q204023|qid=Q204023|lt=Warring States period|1=Sengoku period}}. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, a survey by {{ill|lt=Amano Nobukage|Q6535030|qid=Q6535030|1=Amano Sadakage}}, a {{ill|lt=kokugaku|Q855159|qid=Q855159|lt=National Learning|1=Kokugaku}} scholar of the {{ill|lt=Owari Domain|Q1062072|qid=Q1062072|1=Owari Domain}}, identified the Shikinaisha Inagi Shrine as Tendō-gū in Yoriki Village, Niwa District. * It is said to have enjoyed strong support from the Owari Domain. In {{ill|lt=1724|Q6926|qid=Q6926|1=1724}} ({{ill|lt=Kyōhō|Q1145048|qid=Q1145048|1=Kyōhō}} 9), through shinbutsu syncretism, it became the Rinzai temple Tendōzan Kōshō-ji. In {{ill|lt=1741|Q7573|qid=Q7573|1=1741}} ({{ill|lt=Kanpō|Q1145798|qid=Q1145798|1=Kanpō}} 1), by order of the Owari Domain, it was moved to Nowake-shinden, Yagoto Village, {{ill|lt=Aichi District, Aichi|Q552687|qid=Q552687|lt=Aichi District|1=Aichi District}} (present {{ill|lt=Shōwa-ku|Q1155273|qid=Q1155273|1=Shōwa-ku}} of {{ill|lt=Nagoya|Q11751|qid=Q11751|1=Nagoya}}). * In {{ill|lt=1868|Q7717|qid=Q7717|1=1868}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 1), it separated from Tendōzan Kōshō-ji as Inagi Shrine due to separation of Shinto and Buddhism, and moved back to its original site. * In {{ill|lt=1872|Q7753|qid=Q7753|1=1872}} (Meiji 5) it became village shrine, and in {{ill|lt=1923|Q2169|qid=Q2169|1=1923}} ({{ill|lt=Taishō|Q329174|qid=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 12) it became gōsha. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu-Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} * Ōnakatsu-hiko-no-Mikoto *: An imperial prince of {{ill|lt=Emperor Suinin|Q314850|qid=Q314850|1=Emperor Suinin}}, younger brother of {{ill|lt=Isanishikiirihiko-no-Mikoto|Q11372194|qid=Q11372194|1=Prince Inishikiirihiko}}. Male in the {{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|qid=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}, but in Nihon Shoki and others appears as "Ōnaka-hime-no-Mikoto," female. * {{ill|qid=Q595520|lt=Tsukuyomi|Q595520|qid=Q595520|lt=Tsukiyo-mi-no-Mikoto|1=Tsukuyomi-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|qid=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi-no-Kami|Q1107286|qid=Q1107286|lt=Iotsu-iwamura-no-Mikoto|1=Futsunushi}} * {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|lt=Kikurihime-no-Kami|Q11619891|qid=Q11619891|lt=Shirayama-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Kikurihime}} * {{ill|lt=Kagutsuchi|Q1640658|qid=Q1640658|lt=Homusubi-no-Kami|1=Kagu-tsuchi}} * {{ill|lt=Haraedo-no-Ōkami|Q11588504|qid=Q11588504|lt=Four Haraedo Great Deities|1=Haraedo no Kami}} === Cultural properties === ;Kōnan City designated natural monument * Mukuroji tree{{Cite web|和書|date= |url=http://www.city.konan.lg.jp/syogai/bunkazai/mukuroji.html |title=Mukuroji |publisher=Konan City |accessdate=2013-05-28}} === Location === * Yoriki-chō Inagi 96, Kōnan, Aichi === Transportation === * 30 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Hotei Station|Q5911122|qid=Q5911122|1=Hotei Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Inuyama Line|Q6810411|qid=Q6810411|lt=Inuyama Line|1=Meitetsu Inuyama Line}} of {{ill|lt=Nagoya Railroad|Q30850|qid=Q30850|lt=Meitetsu|1=Meitetsu}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Inagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Inagi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Owari Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Aichi Prefecture]] [[Category:Ward and municipal designated natural monuments]] [[Category:History of Konan, Aichi]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Konan, Aichi]]
